title: Queen Victoria & Imperial Ryde
subtitle: The town that became a gateway to Osborne
description: Follow the story from the Esplanade into Union Street, Dover Street, St Thomas Square and the High Street. Discover how Ryde grew around Queen Victoria's Island presence: piers, hotels, dispatches and civic spaces.
bestFor: Cultural visitors, heritage tourists, hotel guests, schools and civic partners.
partnerFit: Hotels, cafés, independent shops, heritage buildings and town-centre venues.
routePurpose: Guides arriving ferry and hovercraft passengers off the Esplanade and into the town centre.
playableNote: Played today as the 1862 Mystery Trail — the featured pilot experience on this page.

media.alt: Queen Victoria Manor timeslip render loop

title: Wartime Solent Defence
subtitle: How Ryde's coast helped protect Portsmouth Harbour
description: Walk or cycle the coastal corridor from Ryde towards Seaview and reveal how piers, beaches, batteries, observation points and naval sites formed part of the defensive network protecting Spithead and Portsmouth Harbour during the Second World War.
bestFor: Walkers, cyclists, military-history visitors, families, schools and coastal tourists.
partnerFit: Seafront cafés, pubs, hotels, attractions, walking groups and cycling partners.
routePurpose: Extends visitor dwell time along the Ryde-to-Seaview coastal corridor.
playableNote: Route research and physical signage collateral are already produced for this chapter.

title: Ryde Smugglers' Past
subtitle: Cellars, contraband and hidden Ryde
description: Follow the clues beneath the polite Georgian and Victorian townscape to discover Ryde's older world of smugglers, vaulted cellars, local ale houses and hidden routes. This trail is designed to turn hidden history into evening economy, pub visits, cellar bars, cafés and curiosity-led discovery.
bestFor: Hidden-history fans, families, evening visitors, pub-goers and local explorers.
partnerFit: Cellar bars, pubs, cafés, antique shops, curio sellers and local ale venues.
routePurpose: Builds night-time economy footfall through the town centre's hidden spaces.
playableNote: A venue-led expansion concept, anchored by partners such as The Smugglers' Cellar.

media.alt: Ryde Smugglers' Past vaulted cellar loop
